columns.description: Employee role classification for pay equity analysis
columns.expression: CASE WHEN `IS_ADMIN` = true THEN 'Admin' WHEN `IS_TEACHER` = true THEN 'Teacher' ELSE 'Other' END

CASE WHEN `years_of_service` >= 35 THEN 'Imminent (35+ yrs)' WHEN `years_of_service` >= 30 THEN 'Near-term (30-34 yrs)' WHEN `years_of_service` >= 25 THEN 'Mid-term (25-29 yrs)' ELSE 'Long-term (<25 yrs)' END

columns.description: Benefits cost tier for optimization analysis
columns.expression: CASE WHEN `total_compensation` > 0 AND (`TOTAL_BENEFITS` / `total_compensation` * 100) > 30 THEN 'Very High (>30%)' WHEN `total_compensation` > 0 AND (`TOTAL_BENEFITS` / `total_compensation` * 100) > 20 THEN 'High (20-30%)' WHEN `total_compensation` > 0 AND (`TOTAL_BENEFITS` / `total_compensation` * 100) > 10 THEN 'Normal (10-20%)' WHEN `total_compensation` > 0 AND (`TOTAL_BENEFITS` / `total_compensation` * 100) > 0 THEN 'Low (<10%)' ELSE 'No Benefits' END
